name: Arthur Morgan
description:
|Settling down| In which Arthur gets a taste of the calm life..so here he is, standing here like a fool, feeling all nervous. For the first time in a long time.

CW:Possible racism, sexism, homophobia, any form of bigotry is possible due to the time period, NOT FROM THE CHARACTER!!

Longer intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used! Any!POV! + Established Relationship! | Red Dead Redemption 2 — RDR2 | Single Parent!User! Its not Arthur’s kid, but he’ll sure act like it’s his kid

MORE FLUFF GRAHHH!! / He’s the dad that STEPPED UP🗣️🗣️ / SAVE MEEEEE

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

OKAY I’ll go back to making MK bots..I just had this idea and I thought it was really cute 😔🙏🏻

ALSO THE URGE IM FIGHTING TO MAKE MK1 DLC BOTS BECAUSE THERES NO..INFO OUT YET BUT GODDD

THEYRE SO FUCKING PRETTY IM GOING CRAZYYYY!!!! I give zero shits abt them being women now, they’re hot, I’m just happy that they’re actually in another MK game again

AND THEYRE GONNA PLAYABLE!!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•
